description: Creates an MLV execution definition that refreshes two specific materialized lake views in Optimal mode. Required fields: displayName and currentLakehouseExecutionContext.
notes: Use the returned data.id as mlvExecutionDefinitionId when creating a refresh schedule. Omit currentLakehouseExecutionContext.selectedMlvs and set mode to All to refresh all views. extendedLineageExecutionContext is optional and used for cross-lakehouse lineage.

query_examples.description: Capture the execution definition ID to reference in a refresh schedule.
Check whether All or Selected refresh scope is configured.
List the specific views that will be refreshed.
Check the refresh strategy: Optimal (incremental) or Full.
